//: Test-only TSC project — relaxes ONE flag vs tsconfig.app.json:
- noUnusedParameters: false (mock fn signatures need unused params to satisfy interface shapes)
noUnusedLocals stays ON to catch the 'imported a sanitizer but forgot to call it'
class of test bug (security review 2026-04-25, WARN-3).
Production code (tsconfig.app.json + tsconfig.node.json) keeps both flags ON.
Do not move test files OUT of this config or tighten these flags without
auditing every existing test for fallout.
